name: Midnight Star
description: Notes While lacking any on-hold effect like most shurikens, the Midnight Star is intended as a burst damage item, inflicting massive damage with a relatively low MP cost. With enough speed-increasing gear, its damage can increase well above 4000 in total, surpassing even the high DMG/MP efficiency of the Ballistic Star. Its straightforward shot pattern allows usage at range with minimal struggle, with all projectiles despawning at the same point.
effects: Afterimages: 3 extra afterimages follow each starHitbox Size: 2 Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
